name: Lamb Chops Bandit Style - Arni Palikari
recipeIngredient: 125 g Kasseri or Gruyere cheese; sliced
recipeInstructions:
COOKING TIME: 1-1/4 HOURS OVEN TEMPERATURE: 160øC (325øF)
1. Lightly grease a frying pan.
2. Fry lamb until browned on each side but not cooked through.
3. Remove and place each chop or steak on a square of foil.
4. Add butter, onion, and garlic to the pan; fry gently until onions are soft.
5. Spoon the onion mixture onto the meat.
6. Place 2 potato slices on each chop and brush with remaining butter.
7. Top with tomato slices and sprinkle lightly with oregano or rigani.
8. Finish with a slice of cheese.
9. Fold foil to seal packages completely.
10. Arrange in a baking dish with cheese on top.
11. Cook for 1-1/2 hours.
12. Serve directly onto plates, accompanied by a tossed green salad.
